data.title: Hong Kong’s SFC sets date for transition to new suspicious transaction reporting platform
data.description:
Hong Kong’s Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has stated that financial institutions must transition to the new suspicious transactions reporting platform. Hong Kong’s initial Suspicious Transaction Report and Management System (STREAM) is set to stop working by midnight on January 28 this year. In its place will be the Second Generation Suspicious Transaction Report and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hong-kong-sfc-transaction-reporting-platform/

data.title: Bitcoin's Path to New Highs Dependent on ETF Inflows Amid Recent Outflows
data.description: Bitcoin's potential to reach a new all-time high is contingent upon the continuation of spot Bitcoin ETF inflows, following significant outflows amounting to $1.3 billion between December 2025 and January 2026. According to NS3.AI, the market is currently experiencing tactical rebalancing, where bursts of inflows are countered by sharp outflows, largely influenced by macroeconomic factors such as Federal Reserve policies. Analysts have identified three potential timing scenarios for Bitcoin's next peak. These scenarios range from a renewed rally in 2026-2027 with sustained inflows to a delayed peak closer to 2028, influenced by traditional halving cycles or extended drawdown risks.

data.title: Expert Who Nailed The Bitcoin Top Now Says Buy At These Levels
data.description:
Chris Burniske, cofounder of Placeholder VC and former crypto lead at Ark Invest, is mapping out where he would consider stepping back into Bitcoin if the market keeps sliding, after earning fresh credit on X for calling major turning points this cycle. His framework lands in the mid-$80,000s down to the low-$50,000s, while a separate technical view from analyst Aksel Kibar points to a broader “base building” process with support clustered in the mid-$70,000s. Price Levels Where To Buy Bitcoin Burniske wrote that he is “not a buyer yet,” but outlined several price areas he’s monitoring. In his view, roughly $80,000 matters as the November 2025 low and a local trough of the current downswing
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/expert-nailed-bitcoin-top-now-says-buy-at-these-levels/

data.title: BlackRock Moves Beyond Spot Bitcoin With Yield-Focused ETF Strategy
data.description:

data.title: Michael Saylor Warns of Risks from Bitcoin Protocol Changes
data.description: Michael Saylor, founder of Strategy, has expressed concerns regarding the potential risks to Bitcoin posed by developers suggesting protocol changes without sufficient cybersecurity measures. According to NS3.AI, Saylor stresses the importance of prioritizing the defense of the network over implementing upgrades, cautioning that even developers with good intentions could inadvertently destabilize Bitcoin. His viewpoint has sparked varied responses within the crypto community, with some individuals highlighting other threats such as the centralization of key ownership.

data.title: Deus X CEO Highlights Infrastructure-Led Growth in Digital Assets
data.description: Deus X CEO Tim Grant shared insights into his journey in the digital asset sector, emphasizing the company's commitment to infrastructure-led growth. According to NS3.AI, Grant underscored the significance of practical and honest discussions within the crypto industry. At the Consensus Hong Kong event, his panel is set to focus on delivering straightforward conversations, steering clear of hype.

data.title: Ambitious developers are biggest risk to Bitcoin, says Michael Saylor
data.description:
Michael Saylor has said that the greatest risk to Bitcoin is ambitious opportunists advocating protocol changes.
source: https://protos.com/ambitious-developers-are-biggest-risk-to-bitcoin-says-michael-saylor/

data.title: Estate Planning Crucial for Cryptocurrency Holders to Secure Wealth
data.description: Millions in cryptocurrency wealth are at risk of vanishing when holders pass away, primarily due to inadequate estate planning. According to NS3.AI, experts caution that delays, misplaced private keys, and fiduciaries lacking knowledge of digital assets exacerbate this problem. It is vital for cryptocurrency holders to provide clear access and instructions to heirs to safeguard inherited digital assets.

data.title: Significant Transfer of SKY Tokens to Galaxy Digital
data.description: A substantial transfer of SKY tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, at 02:50, a total of 35,245,600 SKY tokens were moved from an anonymous address, beginning with 0x12C4, to Galaxy Digital.
